title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 19 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 19 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 19 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/08/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked sharply all the day.The main contract closed at 673.5,decreased of 1.97 %. Traders are no more motivated toship. Steel mills are more mainly on the sidelines, and market turnover continues to pick up.PBF at Shandong port dealt 730-745 yuan/ mt,increase 5 yuan/mt than yesterday.
